case_title: 1645 PACIFIC AVENUE OWNERS ASSOCIATION VS. CHANDLER PROPERTIES

docket_entries.description: SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF 1645 PACIFIC AVENUE OWNERS ASSOCIATION AS TO DEFENDANT CHANDLER PROPERTIES
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF 1645 PACIFIC AVENUE OWNERS ASSOCIATION
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-22-2016 - JUDGMENT.
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT CHANDLER PROPERTIES

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF 1645 PACIFIC AVENUE OWNERS ASSOCIATION RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CHANDLER PROPERTIES $2,808.67 PRINCIPAL, $150.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,958.67 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT CHANDLER PROPERTIES
TRIAL RESET TO SEP-22-2016 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506 TRIAL OF AUG-22-2016 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,808.67 FILED BY 1645 PACIFIC AVENUE OWNERS ASSOCIATION AS TO DEFENDANT CHANDLER PROPERTIES ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-22-2016 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
DECLARATION OF 1645 PACIFIC AVENUE OWNERS ASSOCIATION : RESET FILED BY PLAINTIFF 1645 PACIFIC AVENUE OWNERS ASSOCIATION
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE:$85.00) SERVED AUG-22-2016, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT CHANDLER PROPERTIES

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF SEP-22-2016 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF SEP-22-2016 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF WAS REPRESENTED BY STEPHANIE SIMEONE--PLAINTIFF'S AGENT; PAST PRESIDENT BOARD OF DIRECTORS. DEFENDANT WAS REPRESENTED BY CAROLYN CHANDLER--PRESIDENT OF THE COMPANY. PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
